_comment: Lighthouse CI budgets. Run against /p1 — representative principle page; indexhas the heaviest payload of any URL. Resource-size budget is split: the error ceiling (~900 KB) is a guardrail against regressions on top of current reality; the warn target (400 KB) is the aspirational budget post-font-subset (Latin-subset Monaspace Xenon — TODOS P3). When the subset lands, collapse both back to 400 KB error.

collect.startServerCommand: bun run build && bun x wrangler dev --local --port 8787
